title: perilla nankinensis
intro: Perilla nankinensis, also known as Chinese perilla or Siamese basil, is a plant species in the mint family native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Perilla nankinensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and antiviral properties. Perilla nankinensis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
